message:
✨ Use GraphQL to assign Copilot instead of comment

The comment-based approach doesn't trigger Copilot. This uses the
GraphQL mutation to directly assign copilot-swe-agent to the issue.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
